result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates NuGet packages in a solution to their latest versions

Usage:
  NugetUpdate [<directory>] [options]

Arguments:
  <directory>  The directory to update packages in [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-lrnuge-23c380bb-5cbcc6c5]

Options:
  --allow-major      Enable major version updates
  --filter <filter>  Comma-separated glob patterns to filter packages (e.g. "Microsoft*,Serilog*")
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
  --version          Show version information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Updates NuGet packages in a solution to their latest versions

Usage:
  NugetUpdate [<directory>] [options]

Arguments:
  <directory>  The directory to update packages in [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-lrnuge-23c380bb-5cbcc6c5]

Options:
  --allow-major      Enable major version updates
  --filter <filter>  Comma-separated glob patterns to filter packages (e.g. "Microsoft*,Serilog*")
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
  --version          Show version information
